{
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsRegressor\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Data Setup\n",
        "study_hours = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]).reshape(-1, 1)\n",
        "scores = np.array([30, 40, 50, 60, 65, 70, 80])\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Model Training (K=7)\n",
        "model = KNeighborsRegressor(n_neighbors=7)\n",
        "model.fit(study_hours, scores)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Visaluization\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "# BEFORE: Plot the training data points\n",
        "plt.scatter(study_hours, scores, color='blue', label='Original Data (Before)', s=100)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Testing a specific point (4.5 hours)\n",
        "test_point = 4.5\n",
        "test_pred = model.predict([[test_point]])\n",
        "plt.scatter(test_point, test_pred, color='green', marker='X', s=200, label=f'Test Point: {test_point}h')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Formatting the plot\n",
        "plt.title('KNN Regression: Study Hours vs. Test Scores (K=7)')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Hours Studied')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Exam Score')\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsClassifier\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Data Setup\n",
        "study_hours = np.array([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]).reshape(-1, 1)\n",
        "scores = np.array([30, 40, 50, 60, 65, 70, 80])\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Create Classification Labels (1 if score > 50, else 0)\n",
        "results = (scores > 50).astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Model Training (K=5)\n",
        "# We use Classifier instead of Regressor\n",
        "model = KNeighborsClassifier(n_neighbors=5)\n",
        "model.fit(study_hours, results)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Visualization Setup\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plotting Failures (0) in Red and Passes (1) in Blue\n",
        "plt.scatter(study_hours[results == 0], [0]*len(study_hours[results == 0]), color='red', s=100, label='Fail (<=50)')\n",
        "plt.scatter(study_hours[results == 1], [1]*len(study_hours[results == 1]), color='blue', s=100, label='Pass (>50)')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Testing a specific point (4.5 hours)\n",
        "test_point = 4.5\n",
        "test_class = model.predict([[test_point]])\n",
        "test_color = 'blue' if test_class == 1 else 'red'\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.scatter(test_point, test_class, color=test_color, marker='X', s=200, label=f'Test Point: {test_point}h')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Formatting\n",
        "plt.title('KNN Classification: Study Hours vs. Pass/Fail (K=5)')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Hours Studied')\n",
        "plt.yticks([0, 1], ['Fail (0)', 'Pass (1)']) # Clean up the Y-axis labels\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 564
